summary:
Claim: The most probable diagnosis is Eisenmenger syndrome.  
Evidence: - Central cyanosis results from reversed right-to-left shunting due to severe pulmonary hypertension. - Left ventricular hypertrophy arises from chronic pressure overload caused by increased systemic afterload.  
Answer: B
